hero.title: How the Demo Election Works
hero.subtitle: Experience a complete online election - secure, anonymous, and without registration.

overview.title: Your path through the demo election

step1.title: Enter Your Code
step1.description: Your personal 8-character code is displayed directly on screen. This simulates the code you would receive by email or SMS in a real election.
step1.example_label: Here is what it looks like:
step1.note: The code is only valid for this session and expires after 60 minutes.

step2.title: Accept the Voting Agreement
step2.description: Read the election rules and confirm your agreement. This is an important legal step in every democratic election.
step2.checkbox_example: I agree to the voting rules and accept the terms and conditions.

step3.title: Select Your Candidates
step3.description: Choose your preferred candidates. There are national positions (visible to all voters) and regional positions (filtered by your location).
step3.candidate_example_role: Candidate for the position of President
step3.no_vote_title: No Vote - What does this mean?
step3.no_vote_body: You can skip individual positions if you do not want to support any candidate. Your ballot remains valid - you do not have to vote for every position.

step4.title: Review & Confirm
step4.description: Review your selections and confirm your vote by entering your code a second time.
step4.two_codes_title: Why do I need to enter the code twice?
step4.two_codes_body: The second code entry proves that the same person who started the voting session is also finalising it. This prevents session hijacking - even if someone intercepts your session between steps, they cannot complete the vote without your code.

step5.title: Done - Your Vote is Counted
step5.description: After confirmation you receive a unique receipt code. You can use it at any time to verify that your vote was correctly recorded.
step5.receipt_caption: Your personal receipt code - 12 characters, unique and anonymous
step5.anon_body: The receipt code is stored as a one-way hash - your name or email is never linked to your vote. You can use the code to verify the record without revealing how you voted.
step5.verify_note: Enter your receipt code to confirm that your vote was counted.

cta.title: Ready for your first demo election?
cta.subtitle: No registration required - start now in 5 simple steps.
